title: Containment Lock
subtitle: CRYO SPECIMEN SEQUENCER
intro: The cryo sequencer scrambled during evacuation. Restore the specimen sequence to release the lock code.
puzzleBody: Tap a tile next to the empty slot to slide it. Arrange tiles 1 through 8 in order — left to right, top to bottom.
solvedMessage: Sequencer restored. Use this combination on Containment Lock.
